data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding auto-start settings, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific setting. The linked use case describes the process of creating a Zoom meeting and the actions taken by the therapist and client, but it does not mention whether the auto-start setting is enabled or if the host must join first. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: Auto-start settings (host must join first) not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
